Secure Cloud Storage & Internet Storage Services | Sync
This website stores cookies on your computer. These cookies are used to anonymously collect information about how you interact with our website and allow us to remember you and your preferences. We use this information in order to improve and customize your browsing experience and for analytics and metrics about our visitors both on this website and other media. To find out more about the cookies we use, see our Privacy Policy.
If you decline, cookies won't be used and certain experiences may break and functionality may be disabled. A single cookie will be used in your browser to remember your preference.

Sign in
Cloud storage built for privacy
Sync keeps your files safe, secure, and 100% private with end-to-end encryption
— not
even we can see them. Simple, fast, and always in your control.
TRY SYNC FREE
VIEW PLANS
Join over
2.7 million
super-productive teams in sync
Trusted by teams at:
Sync better together
Sync connects your internal teams, external partners, clients, customers, documents, files, computers and mobile devices together seamlessly, so everyone is always up-to-date and on the same page.
Access your files anywhere, any time
Access your files instantly from all your computers, mobile devices and the web. Work from home, from the office or from the most idea-inspiring places on the planet.
Share and collaborate securely with anyone
Create centralized folders that your internal team members and external collaborators can easily access. Manage permissions to keep your most important work protected at all times.
Send and receive files professionally
Share your documents through a custom-branded client file portal with your company logo on full display. Build client trust and set your business apart.
Transform your desktop with Sync CloudFiles
Free up storage space on your computer with files on demand. Browse your cloud files directly from Windows Explorer and Mac Finder. Never worry about storage space again.
Keep all your work always backed up
Sync backs up your company's documents in real time, ensuring you can restore any file, any time. Recover from ransomware, hardware failure and human error in an instant. Whew!
Security & compliance built for peace of mind
Sync includes groundbreaking privacy protection features, enterprise grade infrastructure and certification with the most widely accepted security and privacy regulations worldwide. Your data is safe with Sync.
To infinity and beyond!
Say goodbye to surprise transfer fees and stop worrying about running out of storage space again. Unlock the unlimited potential of your team with
unlimited cloud storage
and
unlimited data transfer
.
Get your best work done with
Sync Pro Teams Unlimited
. Imagine your life without limits.
GO UNLIMITED TODAY
Safe with Sync
We started Sync ten years ago with the goal of creating a secure cloud storage platform designed to protect your privacy. Sync has grown quite a bit since then but our mission hasn't changed. Today Sync is your safe space to share big ideas, store important information and collaborate on game-changing projects. To make the world a better place.
When life is in sync we create moments that inspire and memories that last. It's what being in Sync is all about.
Learn how Sync helps protect your privacy.
Take back control of your data
Join over 2.7 million people who trust Sync to keep their files private, secure, and always accessible.
Compare Plans
Get 5 GB Free

Sync core features:
Teams 1TB
Teams 2TB
Teams 10TB
Storage
The amount of cloud storage you get per user - you can upgrade to add more storage anytime
1 TB
2 TB
10 TB
Users
The number of people on your team (clients and customers you share with do not count as users)
3+
3+
3+
Data transfer
The number of people you can share with, and the amount of share data you can transfer per month
Unlimited
Unlimited
Unlimited
Sharing and collaboration
Share your files and folders securely with anyone, request files easily too
Realtime backup and sync
Back up your files all in one place, so you never lose your files again
Access from anywhere
Access your Sync account from any Windows, Mac, iOS or Android device, or any web browser
Security & privacy protection:
End-to-end encryption
Sync's unique end-to-end encrypted storage platform ensures that only you have access to your files, which is the only way you can truly trust the cloud
No third-party tracking
Sync does not track, share or sell app usage data
SOC 2 Type 1
System and Organization Controls (SOC) 2 Type 1 compliance built-in
HIPAA compliance
Sync is committed to safeguarding personal healthcare information (PHI) by complying with government mandated regulations such as HIPAA
GDPR compliance
Sync is committed to safeguarding UK / EU personal information by complying with the EU GDPR
PIPEDA compliance
Sync is a perfect choice for conducting business worldwide, with EU, UK and Canadian compliance built in.
Data protection:
File history and recovery
Preview and restore previous versions of a file, including deleted files
180-day history
365-day history
365-day history
Advanced share controls
Controls like read-only access, expiry dates, download limits and notifications ensure you're always in control
Restrict downloads
Set links to preview only (no download) when sharing previewable document formats such as PDF, Excel, Word and image files
Password protected sharing
Password protect your links for added security
Password protected sharing
Manage per-user, per folder access permissions easily
Granular permissions
Remotely delete files when revoking access to shares, to maintain compliance
Remote share wipe
Disable lost or stolen devices easily, to keep your Sync account safe
Remote device lockout
Add a second layer of security to your account and devices
Two-factor auth (2FA)
Easily change your account details to transfer ownership at any time
Transfer account ownership
Easily change your account details to transfer ownership at any time
Productivity features:
Link sharing
Easily share files and folders to anyone, by sending secure links
Unlimited
Unlimited
Unlimited
Team shared folders
Collaborate with internal and external users, by working out of the same set of folders and files
Unlimited
Unlimited
Unlimited
Custom branding
Replace the Sync logo with your company logo when sharing files externally to clients
File requests
Easily request files from multiple people, without giving them access to what others have sent
File comments
Enable comments when sharing with links to keep your communication all in one place
Document previews
Preview Microsoft Office document formats, PDF and image formats without downloading
Office 365 supported
Open, edit and save your documents in Sync with the Microsoft Office 365 desktop, mobile or online web browser apps (requires an Office 365 license)
Sync Vault
Archive your files in the cloud-only, to free up space on your computers and devices
Sync CloudFiles
Save space on your computer with files-on-demand. Manage which files in your Sync folder are cloud-only and which are local.
Desktop apps and integration
Sync integrates directly with Windows File Explorer and Mac Finder, making it easy to work the way you always do
Mobile apps
Access your files in Sync directly from your phone or tablet and automatically upload your photos and videos from your devices
Auto camera upload
Automatically upload photos taken on your mobile device to your Sync account
Offline access
Access your files, even if you don't have an internet connection
Notifications
Get instant notifications when someone has viewed a file you shared
Selective sync
With multiple computers, define which folders in your Sync folder download to each computer
Activity logs
Monitor user, file and account activity so you can audit who is doing what
Administration tools for teams:
Multi-user admin console
Administrator account to add, remove and manage separate accounts for each user (team member or employee)
Administrator account
Super-user account
Centralized billing
All employee accounts are billed together and newly added users are pro-rated
Manage user passwords
Set passwords for each user, allowing you quickly restore forgotten passwords or sign in as users to monitor activity
Role-based access controls (RBAC)
Configure user permissions by group
Admin role delegation
Enable multiple administrators as needed
2FA enforcement policy
Enforce 2FA per user, group, or company wide
File sharing data governance
Enable or disable link and folder sharing per user or group
Group-level share folder management
Assign  centralized folder access per user or group
Support:
99.9% uptime
Help guides
Priority email support
VIP response time
Scheduled phone support during business hours
Do you have a demo or free trial?
Yes! Unlock your massive cloud storage account with a zero-risk,
30-day free trial
. Get instant access and start uploading in seconds. Enjoy the freedom to do your best work with automatic syncing, easy sharing and worry-free privacy. You can start now and cancel anytime.
What methods of payment do you accept?
Sync accepts Visa, MasterCard, American Express, PayPal and Discover. There are no hidden costs or setup fees, and you can upgrade or change plans at any time (upgrades are always pro-rated for fair billing).
Questions?
Contact us
at any time. We're real people ready to help you with any sales or technical support related questions you may have. And we love talking about security, privacy, and encryption too.
Join over
2.7 million
super-productive teams in sync
Trusted by teams at:
Start your Free Trial
Get 30-days of massive cloud storage absolutely risk-free.

hits.title: Securely store all your sensitive files with Sync.com
Ask HN: Sync.com – should I trust it, or not?
Ask HN: What privacy conscious cloud storage provider do you use?
Show HN: V-Agent and custom GPT, connecting GPT to multiple channels: phone, web
Models Handler Tool for Golang with Build in ORM and AutoSync Feature

analysis.name: Sync.com
analysis.value_proposition: Zero-knowledge end-to-end encrypted cloud storage for teams that need privacy, regulatory compliance, and secure external file sharing — even Sync cannot access your files.
analysis.ideal_customer: Privacy-conscious small businesses and regulated-industry teams (healthcare, legal, financial services, government) needing compliant encrypted cloud storage with client-facing sharing

features.name: end-to-end encryption
features.description: Zero-knowledge encryption ensuring only the user can access their files
features.evidence_quote: Sync's unique end-to-end encrypted storage platform ensures that only you have access to your files

features.name: cloud storage
features.description: Per-user cloud storage with tiered quotas (1 TB, 2 TB, 10 TB)
features.evidence_quote: 1 TB / 2 TB / 10 TB secure storage

features.name: free tier storage
features.description: 5 GB free cloud storage for individual accounts
features.evidence_quote: Get 5 GB Free

features.name: unlimited storage
features.description: Unlimited cloud storage plan available for teams (Pro Teams Unlimited)
features.evidence_quote: Unlock the unlimited potential of your team with unlimited cloud storage and unlimited data transfer.

features.name: unlimited data transfer
features.description: No caps on data transfer or bandwidth for sharing and syncing
features.evidence_quote: The number of people you can share with, and the amount of share data you can transfer per month — Unlimited

features.name: realtime backup and sync
features.description: Continuous real-time backup of files across all connected devices
features.evidence_quote: Back up your files all in one place, so you never lose your files again

features.name: file history and recovery
features.description: Restore previous file versions and deleted files; 180 days on Teams 1TB, 365 days on Teams 2TB+
features.evidence_quote: Preview and restore previous versions of a file, including deleted files

features.name: ransomware recovery
features.description: Restore files after ransomware attacks, hardware failure, or human error using file history
features.evidence_quote: Recover from ransomware, hardware failure and human error in an instant.

features.name: link sharing
features.description: Share files and folders with anyone via secure links; unlimited links on all paid tiers
features.evidence_quote: Easily share files and folders to anyone, by sending secure links

features.name: team shared folders
features.description: Shared folder workspaces for internal and external collaboration
features.evidence_quote: Collaborate with internal and external users, by working out of the same set of folders and files

features.name: client file portal
features.description: Custom-branded portal for sharing documents professionally with external clients
features.evidence_quote: Share your documents through a custom-branded client file portal with your company logo on full display.

features.name: custom branding
features.description: Replace Sync logo with company logo on external shares; available on Teams 2TB and higher
features.evidence_quote: Replace the Sync logo with your company logo when sharing files externally to clients

features.name: advanced share controls
features.description: Read-only access, expiry dates, download limits, and notifications on shared links
features.evidence_quote: Controls like read-only access, expiry dates, download limits and notifications ensure you're always in control

features.name: restrict downloads
features.description: Set shared links to preview-only mode preventing file downloads for PDF, Office, and image formats
features.evidence_quote: Set links to preview only (no download) when sharing previewable document formats such as PDF, Excel, Word and image files

features.name: password protected sharing
features.description: Password-protect shared links for additional access security
features.evidence_quote: Password protect your links for added security

features.name: granular permissions
features.description: Per-user, per-folder access permissions management
features.evidence_quote: Manage per-user, per folder access permissions easily

features.name: role-based access control
features.description: Role-based user permissions for team access management; available on Teams 2TB and higher
features.evidence_quote: Role-based access control

features.name: admin delegation
features.description: Delegate administrative permissions to sub-admins; available on Teams 2TB and higher
features.evidence_quote: Admin delegation

features.name: administrator account
features.description: Dedicated administrator account for centralized team management
features.evidence_quote: Administrator account

features.name: remote share wipe
features.description: Remotely delete files when revoking access to shares for compliance and data control
features.evidence_quote: Remotely delete files when revoking access to shares, to maintain compliance

features.name: remote device lockout
features.description: Disable lost or stolen devices remotely to protect the Sync account
features.evidence_quote: Disable lost or stolen devices easily, to keep your Sync account safe

features.name: two-factor authentication
features.description: 2FA second-layer security for accounts and devices
features.evidence_quote: Add a second layer of security to your account and devices

features.name: transfer account ownership
features.description: Transfer account ownership between users by updating account details
features.evidence_quote: Easily change your account details to transfer ownership at any time

features.name: file requests
features.description: Request file uploads from multiple people without exposing others' submissions
features.evidence_quote: Easily request files from multiple people, without giving them access to what others have sent

features.name: file comments
features.description: Inline comments on shared links to centralize communication around files
features.evidence_quote: Enable comments when sharing with links to keep your communication all in one place

features.name: document previews
features.description: In-browser preview of Microsoft Office, PDF, and image formats without downloading
features.evidence_quote: Preview Microsoft Office document formats, PDF and image formats without downloading

features.name: file streaming
features.description: Stream supported media file types directly in the browser
features.evidence_quote: Supported file types for previews, thumbnails, and streaming

features.name: office 365 integration
features.description: Open, edit, and save Sync files directly via Microsoft Office 365 desktop, mobile, or web apps
features.evidence_quote: Open, edit and save your documents in Sync with the Microsoft Office 365 desktop, mobile or online web browser apps

features.name: sync vault
features.description: Cloud-only archive that removes files from local storage while keeping them accessible in the cloud
features.evidence_quote: What is the Sync Vault?

features.name: sync cloudfiles
features.description: Files-on-demand letting users browse cloud files from Windows Explorer and Mac Finder without full local sync
features.evidence_quote: Browse your cloud files directly from Windows Explorer and Mac Finder. Never worry about storage space again.

features.name: cross-platform access
features.description: Access files from Windows, Mac, iOS, Android, and any web browser
features.evidence_quote: Access your Sync account from any Windows, Mac, iOS or Android device, or any web browser

features.name: desktop app
features.description: Native desktop application for Windows and Mac
features.evidence_quote: How do I download and install the Sync desktop app?

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Native mobile applications for iOS and Android
features.evidence_quote: The Sync mobile apps

features.name: web panel
features.description: Full-featured browser-based interface for file management
features.evidence_quote: How to use the Sync.com web panel

features.name: no third-party tracking
features.description: Sync does not track, share, or sell app usage data to third parties
features.evidence_quote: Sync does not track, share or sell app usage data

features.name: soc 2 type 1 compliance
features.description: System and Organization Controls (SOC) 2 Type 1 certification
features.evidence_quote: System and Organization Controls (SOC) 2 Type 1 compliance built-in

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: HIPAA-compliant storage for protected healthcare information (PHI)
features.evidence_quote: Sync is committed to safeguarding personal healthcare information (PHI) by complying with government mandated regulations such as HIPAA

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: EU and UK GDPR data protection compliance
features.evidence_quote: Sync is committed to safeguarding UK / EU personal information by complying with the EU GDPR

features.name: pipeda compliance
features.description: Canadian PIPEDA privacy law compliance
features.evidence_quote: Sync is a perfect choice for conducting business worldwide, with EU, UK and Canadian compliance built in.

features.name: data export
features.description: Download and export all Sync account data
features.evidence_quote: How do I download / export all my Sync data?

features.name: dropbox migration
features.description: Built-in workflow to transfer files from Dropbox to Sync
features.evidence_quote: How do I transfer my files from Dropbox to Sync?

features.name: conflicted file copy handling
features.description: Detection and management of file sync conflicts across devices
features.evidence_quote: What is a conflicted file copy?

features.name: vip support
features.description: Priority VIP customer support; available on Teams 10TB tier only
features.evidence_quote: VIP support

features.name: enterprise account manager
features.description: Dedicated account manager for enterprise deployments
features.evidence_quote: Account manager

features.name: enterprise training
features.description: Onboarding and training options for enterprise customers
features.evidence_quote: Training options

features.name: webinar and video tutorials
features.description: Video-based training resources to help users get started
features.evidence_quote: Webinars — Video tutorials to help you get up and running quickly.

differentiators: Zero-knowledge end-to-end encryption — not even Sync can see user files
No third-party tracking or sale of app usage data
HIPAA, GDPR, PIPEDA, and SOC 2 Type 1 compliance all built-in across paid plans
Unlimited storage and unlimited data transfer on Pro Teams Unlimited plan
Canadian-based company with Canadian cloud storage positioning
Client file portal with custom branding for professional external sharing

complaints: Community trust concerns raised: 'Ask HN: Sync.com – should I trust it, or not?'

tiers.name: Teams 1TB
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 TB/user, advanced sharing, administrator account, 180-day file history, 3-user minimum

tiers.name: Teams 2TB
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2 TB/user, custom branding, role-based access control, admin delegation, 365-day file history, 3-user minimum

tiers.name: Teams 10TB
tiers.headline_inclusions: 10 TB/user, all Teams 2TB features, VIP support, 30-day free trial, 3-user minimum

pricing.notes: All team plans require 3-user minimum. Enterprise requires 100+ users minimum with custom requirements. Active promo at time of scrape: 50% off for 1 year (Teams 1TB drops to $4/mo monthly or $3/mo annual; Teams 2TB to $6/$4.50; Teams 10TB to $9/$7.50). Individual plans exist on a separate pricing tab but pricing was not captured in source. Pro Teams Unlimited plan advertised on landing page but not shown in pricing table.
